languages.text: [Обратиться к оперируемому]"Здесь твоя мать, Гнотек, и она очень беспокоится о тебе. Держись ради нее".
[Address the patient] "Your mother is here, Gnotec, and she is very worried about you. Hold on for her."
languages.original_text: [Обратиться к оперируемому]"Здесь твоя мать, Гнотек, и она очень беспокоится о тебе. Держись ради нее".

traits.locale_text: [Address the patient] "Your mother is here, Gnotec, and she is very worried about you. Hold on for her."

[Address the patient] "Your mother is here, Gnotec, and she is very worried about you. Hold on for her."

languages.text: [Den Patienten ansprechen] "Eure Mutter ist hier, Gnotec. Sie macht sich große Sorgen. Haltet für sie durch."
languages.original_text: [Address the patient] "Your mother is here, Gnotec, and she is very worried about you. Hold on for her."

traits.locale_text: [Den Patienten ansprechen] "Eure Mutter ist hier, Gnotec. Sie macht sich große Sorgen. Haltet für sie durch."

languages.text: [Vous adresser au patient] « Votre mère est ici, Gnotec, et elle s'inquiète beaucoup pour vous. Tenez bon, pour elle. »
languages.original_text: [Address the patient] "Your mother is here, Gnotec, and she is very worried about you. Hold on for her."

traits.locale_text: [Vous adresser au patient] « Votre mère est ici, Gnotec, et elle s'inquiète beaucoup pour vous. Tenez bon, pour elle. »

languages.text: 【对病人说】“你母亲来了，诺泰克，她非常担心你。为了她，撑下去。”
languages.original_text: [Address the patient] "Your mother is here, Gnotec, and she is very worried about you. Hold on for her."

traits.locale_text: 【对病人说】“你母亲来了，诺泰克，她非常担心你。为了她，撑下去。”

languages.text: [Dirigirte al paciente] «Su madre está aquí, Gnotec, y está muy preocupada. Resista por ella».
languages.original_text: [Address the patient] "Your mother is here, Gnotec, and she is very worried about you. Hold on for her."

traits.locale_text: [Dirigirte al paciente] «Su madre está aquí, Gnotec, y está muy preocupada. Resista por ella».

languages.text: [手術を受けている人に声をかける]「グノテック、お母さんが来ていますよ。がんばってください」
languages.original_text: [Address the patient] "Your mother is here, Gnotec, and she is very worried about you. Hold on for her."

traits.locale_text: [手術を受けている人に声をかける]「グノテック、お母さんが来ていますよ。がんばってください」

languages.text: [Hastaya seslen] "Annen burada Gnotec ve senin için çok endişeleniyor. Onun için dayan."
languages.original_text: [Address the patient] "Your mother is here, Gnotec, and she is very worried about you. Hold on for her."

traits.locale_text: [Hastaya seslen] "Annen burada Gnotec ve senin için çok endişeleniyor. Onun için dayan."
